content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Comprehensive review of the failure reconciliation implementation. The change adds ~2900 lines of new code in failure_reconciliation.rs plus significant integration in daemon_loop.rs, run.rs, controller.rs, milestone.rs, service.rs, fs.rs, and queries.rs. All 794 tests pass, clippy is clean with -D warnings, and cargo fmt passes. The implementation correctly: records failures in journal with BeadFailed events, leaves beads open (no br close), counts attempts across multiple failures, escalates to NeedsOperator after MAX_RETRIES (3), is idempotent for replayed runs, uses structured tracing, and handles complex edge cases like stale replays, same-run-id retries, and historical event repair. The controller state machine changes (Blocked now preserves active context, new transitions Blocked→Running and Blocked→Reconciling) are well-tested. The CLI sync path correctly delegates failure handling to reconcile_failure_sync instead of duplicating logic. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
